raw.objective: “to characterize the pharmacokinetics of oral levetiracetam in Japanese children, to assess dose recommendations for Japanese children by comparing the pharmacokinetics in Japanese adults and children and to compare levetiracetam pharmacokinetics in Japanese and North American children”
raw.covariates: Tested: AGE, comedications, WT on CL, AGE and WT on Vd, formulation on Ka Included: WT on CL and Vd,
raw.observations: Model predicts the data well, with minimal covariates needed. No interaction between LVT and comedications. No differences between ethnicities described (but unclear if evaluated)
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination
raw.parameter_values: theta1=2.56 theta2=2.10 theta3=1.22 theta4=20.4 omega1= 0.736 omega2= 0.0396 omega2,3= 0.00328 omega3= 0.0149 sigma1= 0.0357
raw.validation: Yes (vpc of 500) / Yes (externally validated on North American children)

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

omega_covariance.conversion: Appendix covariance retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to characterize the pharmacokinetics of oral levetiracetam in Japanese children, to assess dose recommendations for Japanese children by comparing the pharmacokinetics in Japanese adults and children and to compare levetiracetam pharmacokinetics in Japanese and North American children”

covariates.raw: Tested: AGE, comedications, WT on CL, AGE and WT on Vd, formulation on Ka Included: WT on CL and Vd,

validation.raw: Yes (vpc of 500) / Yes (externally validated on North American children)

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
